steps.name: project_context
steps.answer: We study ICU in-hospital mortality prediction from unstructured clinical notes and analyze whether a pretrained clinical language model exhibits systematic performance disparities across ethnicity groups.Input data:1.Clinical notes of ICU, converted into 10000 dim TF-IDF feature. 2.Ethnical information, a 6 dim one-hot vector that indicate the ethnical group of the patient.Output is A real number indicate the mortality probabilities
